name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!
name_cn:
BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!
Style: 764044
Size: 16.5*10.5*9
